highlights.title: Added App Lock
highlights.description: Enable PIN protection in Settings to add another access layer for your local reading workspace.

highlights.title: Clearer translation feedback
highlights.description: Web-article paragraphs now show clearer feedback when translated text has been applied.

highlights.title: Smoother table of contents
highlights.description: The reader TOC highlights and focuses the active section, with smoother open and close motion.

highlights.title: More stable reader chat
highlights.description: Assistant streaming is more stable, reducing inconsistent message state or rendering during generation.

highlights.title: Updated download and update flow
highlights.description: Website installers and update assets now route through the download service for link checks and download metrics.
